tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP-FROM-PORT
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
exit
class-map match-any CM-ICMP
 match access-group name ICMP-FROM-PORT
policy-map PM-ICMP-POLICE
 class CM-ICMP
  police 800000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input PM-ICMP-POLICE
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended BLOCK-ICMP-FROM-UBUNTU
 deny icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
 permit ip any any
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 ip access-group BLOCK-ICMP-FROM-UBUNTU in
exit
end
write memory
show ip access-lists BLOCK-ICMP-FROM-UBUNTU
show interface GigabitEthernet0/1"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"terminal length 0\nshow running-config | section interface GigabitEthernet0/1\nshow access-lists"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
no ip access-list extended BLOCK-ICMP-FROM-UBUNTU
ip access-list extended BLOCK-ICMP-FROM-UBUNTU
 deny icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
 permit ip any any
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 ip access-group BLOCK-ICMP-FROM-UBUNTU in
exit
end
write memory
show access-lists BLOCK-ICMP-FROM-UBUNTU
show interface GigabitEthernet0/1"}
